title: King's Gate
summary:
King's Gate may refer to:

Gate of the King (Madagascar) in Mahajanga
King's Gate (Aachen) (German: Königstor)
King's Gate (Berlin) (German: Königstor)
King's Gate (Kaliningrad) (German: Königstor)
King's Gate (Kassel) (German: Königstor)
King's Gate (Minden) (German: Königstor)
King's Gate (Nuremberg) (German: Königstor)
King's Gate (Szczecin)
King's Gate aka Kuninkaanportti in Helsinki
Gate of All Nations in the ruins of Persepolis, Iran
King's gate, a firearm loading mechanism designed by Nelson King for the Winchester Model 1866
